ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., pump, motor, conveyor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of equipment installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., pressure, temperature, current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor (e.g., pressure_in, motor_current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the threshold belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the sensor reading */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the sensor reading */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level (e.g., warning, critical) for threshold breaches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_configurations" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_configurations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., gauge, chart, table) */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboard_configurations ("dashboard_id")
)
